name: Mittel S.p.A
summary: Mittel S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an investment-merchant bank primarily in Italy. The company develops real estate projects for residential and office use; rents office, logistic, retail, and light industrial properties, as well as assets for tourism/luxury hotel use; and invests in private equity funds. It also operates nursing homes, which provide long term care services; designs, produces, and markets toilets, wash basins, sanitary fixtures, and accessories for designer bathroom furnishings; and produces mold construction and cold sheet metal moldings for the automotive sector. In addition, Mittel S.p.A. engages in the clothing business for urban/lifestyle and outdoor segment. The company was formerly known as Mittel-Societ√É¬† Industriale Mediterranea S.p.A. Mittel S.p.A. was founded in 1885 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy. Mittel S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Progetto Co-Val S.P.A.
